2603.25740.title: Drive My Way: Preference Alignment of Vision-Language-Action Model for Personalized Driving
2603.25740.paper_summary: Human driving behavior is inherently personal, which is shaped by long-term habits and influenced by short-term intentions. Individuals differ in how they accelerate, brake, merge, yield, and overtake across diverse situations. However, existing end-to-end autonomous driving systems either optimize for generic objectives or rely on fixed driving modes, lacking the ability to adapt to individual preferences or interpret natural language intent. To address this gap, we propose Drive My Way (DMW), a personalized Vision-Language-Action (VLA) driving framework that aligns with users' long-term driving habits and adapts to real-time user instructions. DMW learns a user embedding from our personalized driving dataset collected across multiple real drivers and conditions the policy on this embedding during planning, while natural language instructions provide additional short-term guidance. Closed-loop evaluation on the Bench2Drive benchmark demonstrates that DMW improves style instruction adaptation, and user studies show that its generated behaviors are recognizable as each driver's own style, highlighting personalization as a key capability for human-centered autonomous driving. Our data and code are available at https://dmw-cvpr.github.io/.
2603.25740.paper_summary_zh: 人類的駕駛行為本質上是個人化的，受到長期習慣的塑造並受到短期意圖的影響。<lb/>個體在加速、剎車、併入、讓路和超車等多種情況下的表現各不相同。<lb/>然而，現有的端到端自動駕駛系統要麼優化通用目標，要麼依賴固定的駕駛模式，缺乏適應個人偏好或解釋自然語言意圖的能力。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們提出了 Drive My Way (DMW)，這是一個個性化的視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 駕駛框架，與用戶的長期駕駛習慣相一致並適應實時用戶指令。<lb/>DMW 從我們收集的多位真實駕駛者的個性化駕駛數據集中學習用戶嵌入，並在規劃過程中根據這一嵌入調整策略，同時自然語言指令提供額外的短期指導。<lb/>在 Bench2Drive 基準上的閉環評估顯示，DMW 改進了風格指令的適應性，而用戶研究表明其生成的行為可被識別為每位駕駛者自己的風格，突顯了個性化作為以人為中心的自動駕駛的關鍵能力。<lb/>我們的數據和代碼可在 https://dmw-cvpr.github.io/ 獲得。
2603.25740.author: Zehao Wang et.al.
2603.25740.authors: Zehao Wang, Huaide Jiang, Shuaiwu Dong, Yuping Wang, Hang Qiu, Jiachen Li
